title: Matera's Expansion to the U.S.
excerpt: From its break-out success with Pix instant payments to unveiling the future with QR code payments, Matera is expanding its operations into the US.
body:
From its break-out success with Pix instant payments to unveiling the future with QR code payments, Matera is expanding its operations into the United States.

Read the full press release [here](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20221209005121/en/Matera-Brings-World-Class-Instant-Payment-and-QR-Code-Payment-Solutions-to-U.S.-Market).
